1.description: You stand at the entrance to a dark dungeon. A narrow passage leads north, and a wider corridor goes east.

2.description: A damp corridor stretches before you. In the shadows you see a Goblin sharpening its blade.

3.description: A wide chamber lit by flickering torches. Two Skeleton Warriors block the path ahead.

4.description: You emerge into a grand hall. A fearsome Orc Chieftain stands guard at the far door, eyeing you with contempt.

5.description: You have reached the inner sanctum. The treasure of the dungeon lies before you — your quest is complete!
